description: John and Tom from Backpack discuss building an xNFT, covering setup, features, and the multi-chain capabilities of Backpack, which supports both Ethereum and Solana.
topic_summary: Introduction to xNFTs and Backpack setup [t=29:84], multi-chain support for Ethereum and Solana [t=171:22], and features of the Backpack wallet [t=195:47].
